title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SITIO OF BURAL IN THE BARRIO OF ZINUNDUNGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN JUAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2694 / 55 OG No. 39, 8272 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2580, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SITIO OF BURAL IN THE BARRIO OF ZINUNDUNGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN JUAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the sitio of Bural in the barrio of Zinundungan, Municipality of Rizal, Province of Cagayan, is changed to San Juan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
